text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
…Come on, Taishin. We agreed you would 
say it first, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sh-Shut up. I was just about to say it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I'm just so happyyy! I-I…

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Hayahide! I LOVE you guuuys!!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh… Not only were you born between us…

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You really are the "centerpiece" that holds 
us all together, Ticket.
